materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"3h3d6","text":"1 Capacitor (10 microFaradios)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7hv26","text":"1 Capacitor (100 microFaradios)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"cdouq","text":"2 Resistencias (100 Ohms)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8i9ra","text":"1 Resistencia (1,000 Ohms)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"8acsg","text":"6 Cables dupont","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"514ao","text":"1 Protoboard","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"bm676","text":"2 Cables banana-caiman","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"5mdv0","text":"1 Osciloscopio","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"2a9dk","text":"1 Sonda de Osciloscopio","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"69ddb","text":"1 Fuente de carga (Bateria)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Reúne todos los materiales que se necesitan y coloca la protoboard en tu área de trabajo.
Conecte la sonda del osciloscopio y conectela a la protoboard.
Encienda la fuente de carga y calibre el voltaje a 5 Volts.
Utiliza los materiales para realizar la simulación del circuito en el protoboard.
creator: Camila Miranda Bajo Gutiérrez
